nasb.text: Throughout all their journeys whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the sons of Israel would set out;

esv.text: Throughout all their journeys, whenever the cloud was taken up from over the tabernacle, the people of Israel would set out.

cnv.text: 在以色列人所有的旅程中是這樣的：每逢雲彩從帳幕收上去的時候，他們就起程；

ccb.text: 一路上，云彩从圣幕升起，他们就出发。
